schemes.label: Renewable Obligation (RO)
schemes.basis: calc module present + wired into report layer

schemes.label: Feed-in Tariff (FiT) Levy
schemes.basis: calc module present + wired into report layer

schemes.label: Climate Change Levy (CCL)
schemes.basis: calc module present + wired into report layer

schemes.label: Guaranteed Standards (GSOP)
schemes.basis: calc module present + wired into report layer

schemes.label: Warm Home Discount (WHD)
schemes.basis: portfolio has 8 domestic customers, below the 150,000 large-supplier threshold -- no obligation

schemes.label: Energy Company Obligation (ECO)
schemes.basis: portfolio has 8 domestic customers, below the 150,000 large-supplier threshold -- no obligation

schemes.label: Carbon Emissions
schemes.basis: calc module present + wired into report layer

schemes.label: Fuel Mix Disclosure (FMD)
schemes.basis: calc module present, not yet wired into report layer

schemes.label: Ofgem Supply Return
schemes.basis: calc module present + wired into report layer

schemes.label: SLC Compliance Scorecard
schemes.basis: calc module present + wired into report layer

schemes.label: FRA Capital Ratio
schemes.basis: calc module present + wired into report layer

schemes.label: Settlement Reconciliation
schemes.basis: calc module present + wired into report layer
